mapper.select:
SELECT mr.medication_record_id, mr.medication_id, mr.administered_at, mr.dose_number, mr.dose_unit, mr.dose_kind, mr.nursing_id, mr.nurse_name, mr.status, mr.progress_status, mr.created_at, mr.patient_id, mr.patient_name, mr.department_name FROM CHJ.MEDICATION_RECORD mr
AND mr.patient_name LIKE '%' || #{patientName} || '%'
AND mr.department_name LIKE '%' || #{departmentName} || '%'
AND UPPER(TRIM(mr.progress_status)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{progressStatus}))
AND SUBSTR(TRIM(mr.administered_at), 1, 10) >= #{startDate}
AND SUBSTR(TRIM(mr.administered_at), 1, 10) <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY mr.administered_at DESC NULLS LAST, mr.medication_record_id DESC
